title: bus.rs: LocalBus Lagged drops are silent — no log, no metric, no caller notification
description: In BusSubscriber::recv for the LocalBus path, RecvError::Lagged is silently swallowed with a 'continue'. A Lagged error means some number of BusMessage items were dropped. In a real multi-client scenario this means cross-instance deliveries were lost, but the only signal is a continue that retries from the oldest available message. There is no tracing::warn\!, no counter, nothing. An operator cannot tell from logs that message drops are occurring. Add at least a tracing::warn\!(n, 'local bus lagged: n messages dropped') before continuing.
